project_type: Next.js 16 with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
test_framework: No test framework - validation via build
verification_instructions: Run npm run build from project root. Build should complete without errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Image domains allowed: images.unsplash.com, plus.unsplash.com, source.unsplash.com (in next.config.ts). If using non-Unsplash images, next.config.ts must be updated.
contribution_requirements: Commit on main branch, do not push.
key_patterns: Products page uses a 'categories' array with id, name, emoji, desc, products[]. Each product has name, desc, img (URL string), badges[]. Framer Motion animations with containerVariants, cardVariants, headerVariants. Responsive grid layout with Tailwind. Images use Next.js Image component with fill and object-cover.
directory_structure: src/app/products/page.tsx is the primary file to modify. next.config.ts controls allowed image domains.
